org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk.Bulk

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core
MongoDB core support.
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk
Abstraction for MongoDB bulk write operations.

  • Uses of Bulk in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BulkWriteResult
    MongoOperations.bulkWrite(Bulk bulk, BulkWriteOptions options)
    Executes the given Bulk to perform insert, update, and delete operations.
    BulkWriteResult
    MongoTemplate.bulkWrite(Bulk bulk, BulkWriteOptions options)
     
    Mono<BulkWriteResult>

    Executes the given Bulk to perform insert, update, and delete operations.
    Mono<BulkWriteResult>
    ReactiveMongoTemplate.bulkWrite(Bulk bulk, BulkWriteOptions options)
     

  • Uses of Bulk in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk

    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.bulk that return Bulk
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Bulk
    Bulk.BulkBuilder.build()
    Builds the Bulk with all operations added so far.
    static Bulk
    Bulk.create(Consumer<Bulk.BulkBuilder> builderCustomizer)
    Creates a new Bulk by applying the given builder customizer to a fresh Bulk.BulkBuilder.
